title: CPU Scheduling Decision Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the criteria and decision-making process an operating system scheduler uses when selecting the next process to execute on the CPU.
elements: Scheduler Invoked (e.g., clock interrupt, I/O complete, process termination)
Criteria: CPU Utilization, Throughput, Turnaround Time, Waiting Time, Response Time
relationships: The Scheduler is invoked by an event
The Scheduler checks the Ready Queue for processes
The Scheduling Algorithm evaluates processes based on the criteria
The selected process is dispatched to the CPU
